subcodes.first_line: O herald of the Covenant! A prayer was raised to the Abhá Kingdom, and mighty confirmations were earnestly sought for thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان مناجاتی بملکوت ابهی گردید و از برای آنحضرت طلب تایید شدید شد
subcodes.subjects: @relationship between government and people, @non-participation in politics, @call to action, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @obedience to and respect for government authority
